title: neonauclea ovata
intro: Neonauclea ovata, also known as the 'Malaysian Oak', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a deciduous tree native to the tropical regions of Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Neonauclea ovata include reducing inflammation and fever, as well as treating various infections and diseases such as diarrhea, dysentery, and respiratory issues. Neonauclea ovata can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
